title: Advanced Coil Electronics
summary: Tesla coil controls remain hopelessly analogue. Work to develop a micro+fpga board that could kick this problem in the teeth.

title: Aroura Desartalis
summary: Aroura Borealis, but "portable"

title: Ball Lightning Dispenser
summary: There is a technique for making low temperature, but highly erratic pyrotechnic sparks. I have reproduced this locally, (request videos if interested). It would be really cool to make something that looked like a Coke machine, that instead dumped a chaotic bright flashing ball of fire onto the floor of the room that vanished without a trace!

title: Crib Lids
summary: Modern cribs have a fundamental design flaw, the open top exposes your child to dangerous conditions such as falling objects, or child predation. Crib Lids brings you the technology needed to keep your loved child safe from the dangers of the world.

title: Dirt for Children
summary: Helping kids get an early start to a wide microbiome

title: Dr Evil - VC Pitch Bait and Switch
summary:
Basically, you book a ton of pitch meetings for whatever is the hotness du jour, but a few minutes into the pitch, start a subtle costume change, and shift into a speech about how the real goal is to ransom the moon. Plenty of fuel to rib the VC's on the call, "Y'all have funded much more evil stuff no?" 

I want to run this skit if I ever get fully out of the Founder/VC rat race.

title: Flesh Ninja (Danger bot)
summary: A large, powerful, and fast robotic arm + vision system trained for murder.

title: Male Birth Control App
summary:
many studies have shown that activities like using a hot tub or anything that elevates the temperature of the male testes is actually a somewhat effective form of birth control. 
This application uses the GPU and CPU in a really hard way to warm up the phone and the user needs to put their nuts on the phone for a prescribed period of time each day. It tracks the amount of time that you do each day and also suggests certain times that may or may not be better

title: MattChat
summary: Taking back the platform for Matt and Matt only

title: Mithril (Ultrafine SA Welded Chainmail)
summary:
There are some simply amazing materials that have come out in the last 50 or so years that are hugely underutilized in the jewelry/art space. 

I think that incredibly fine (<1mm diameter) chainmail made from modern superalloys would feel nearly like cloth if made properly, and be incredibly durable if made as welded closed link construction. Monel is particularly interesting, but various Ni/Ti compositions are really super durable and incredibly workable. https://x.com/goth600/status/1906556820753146021

title: Multiplicative Persistence Rule Systems
summary: I have some ideas how to crack multiplicative persistence. I have an algorithm I have implemented to reduce it to N^2 on the number of digits. I should really write these up at some point

title: NonCon Trap
summary: A trap where you are required to lure the next victim in, perpetuating the cycle of deceit.

title: Open Source Observing Network
summary: Basically OSS version of Exclosure's core tech.

summary: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Einstein_problem

title: Pigeon vision
summary: We see 3 colors, pigeons see 5. Let's see what they see via science!

title: Puzzles by Evil Corp
summary: A puzzle that is literally impossible to assemble.

title: Signal Book Club
summary: Book club via a signal bot and disappearing messages.

title: Space Race Race
summary:
Launch a 3U cubesat with a small use once railgun. 

Use the railgun to fire a payload of generic material at some nearby star system. 

Threaten insemination of a faraway star system with your own genetic lineage.

Kick off the "Space Race Race"

title: Starburn
summary: We have all had a sunburn in our lives, but how many have gotten a burn from a far away star?

title: Subdermal Reflectors
summary: they're tiny glass retro-reflectors that have been made for a number of different purposes, including growth illumination, in this particular embodiment, I want to make tiny glass retro-reflectors that are additionally mirrored in a way that the refractive index matches that of human tissue. The inclusion of these under the skin will give tiny spots that will only show up under flash or very bright light. it's also possible to make these glow in the dark

title: Tesla Orchestra
summary: CDF would build/sell a large number of tesla coil kits and offer assembly workshops/classes help etc. Participants who build a coil can integrate it in a large scale performance of many tesla voices at the burn.

title: Turing Testing Service
summary:
Its pretty simple. An at-home mail in test to test and see if you are a robot. Simply spit in the tube, and mail the samples into our centralized testing service.

Bonus points if you can find some DNA from the John Turing family line, and see if you are a Turing at the same time. Alternatively add a false claim of testing for this with 99.9999999% worldwide accuracy (will be wrong for their family only)

Bonus points if you get shut down by the FDA

title: Ultrasonic Sex Toys - Imaging or Stimulation
summary: Modern ultrasound device can sense the state of a person that they are in contact with, focused ultrasound can trigger nerve activity. It feels like there are virtuous overlaps here wrt. the construction of novel modern sex toys.

title: Universal Ring
summary: A mundane artifact that contains more than seems possible.

title: Universal Simulator Game
summary: A game that simulates and helps give answers to the Drake equation. Ideally tallying how many civilizations arise and who manages to meet each other. Interesting graphics to show ensemble/markov models. Ideally helps people to understand the Dark Forest and other Fermi paradox solutions

title: Wake Word Habit Shaker
summary: Small nudges to act slightly more how you would prefer to.

title: White Noise Headband
summary: this one is pretty simple. it's basically just a bone conduction headphone set that's designed to generate only White noise. it's really intended for parents who want to be able to make white noise for their kids to be able to sleep better but don't want the entire space polluted by it
